response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development, particularly with JavaScript/TypeScript and Dlang, but lacks direct experience with Java/Kotlin and enterprise JVM ecosystems like Spring or enterprise IDE tooling. His background in full-stack development and developer tooling (e.g., MCP at Stripe) is relevant, but the gap in JVM-specific expertise and IDE internals raises concerns about immediate fit for this role.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship ethos (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) evident from roles at RIDE Capital and Shopify.
Proven ability to work on complex systems and large-scale codebases, including low-latency and real-time systems (e.g., Dunnhumby, Shopify).
Experience contributing to developer tooling and automation frameworks (e.g., MCP at Stripe, AI-agent infrastructure).
concerns: No direct experience with Java/Kotlin or JVM internals, which is a core requirement for this role.
Limited or no documented experience with enterprise frameworks (Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate) or IDE internals.
Primary expertise in JavaScript/TypeScript and Dlang, which may not align closely with the JVM-focused tooling needs of this role.
